stemHtml:
ATC: “FASTAIR 345 TAXI VIA BRAVO TO HOLDING POINT RUNWAY 36L.’’

What is the correct response?

options.a: FASTAIR 345 TAXI HOLDING POINT RUNWAY 36L VIA TAXIWAY BRAVO.
options.b: FASTAIR 345 TAXI TO THE HOLDING POINT VIA BRAVO.
options.d: TAXI VIA BRAVO TO HOLDING POINT RUNWAY 36L FASTAIR 345.
